executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
TARGET: LOCAL DEV SERVER at http://localhost:3000. The server is exposed to this agent via the TestSprite tunnel — always use http://localhost:3000 as the base URL. NEVER navigate to https://www.furqan.today — Vercel BotID on production blocks all headless login attempts.

LOGIN (do this first in tests that need auth):
1. Navigate to http://localhost:3000/login
2. Fill email and password, submit the form. Login works locally — BotID is disabled in non-Vercel environments.
CREDENTIALS by role:
- student → "test-student@furqan.test" / env:TEST_STUDENT_PASSWORD
- teacher → "test-teacher@furqan.test" / env:TEST_TEACHER_PASSWORD
- admin → NO credentials; skip admin-only tests.

IMPORTANT — read-only test flows only. Do NOT perform any state-mutating action (no checkout, no payments, no booking creation that writes real records).

Per-test expectations:
- TC001 Student sign-in: Go to http://localhost:3000/login, fill email=test-student@furqan.test and password from env TEST_STUDENT_PASSWORD, submit. PASS = URL leaves /login and reaches /student area.
- TC002 Teacher sign-in: Go to http://localhost:3000/login, fill email=test-teacher@furqan.test and password from env TEST_TEACHER_PASSWORD, submit. PASS = URL reaches /teacher area.
- TC004 Logout: log in as student, then click the logout button (form[action='/api/auth/logout'] button), verify URL returns to /login. PASS = logged out.
- TC007 Bookings stub: GET http://localhost:3000/api/bookings is an INTENTIONAL 501 stub. Treat HTTP 501 as the expected PASS outcome.
- TC011 Teacher view: log in as teacher, verify /teacher dashboard renders with Arabic bookings section (الحجوزات visible). PASS = authenticated teacher view renders.

UI is Arabic, right-to-left.
